bullets: DELICIOUS EXPERIENCE – This Art of Tea Bulk pack includes 50 pyramid tea sachets of our all-new Rose Black Tea. a silky, full body blend of rich black tea with hints of freshly blossomed rose petals that offer a refreshingly complex flavor that will leave you calm and relaxed. Our carefully hand selected rose tea leaves are picked fresh and are made up of the most amazing edible rose petals for desserts we could find. This rose petal tea is just like afternoon tea at your favorite Rose Gardens.

INDIVIDUALLY WRAPPED - Each Art of Tea signature sachet comes individually wrapped in our signature plant-based PLA (polylactic acid), derived from renewable plant sources, pyramid tea bag sachet ready to be steeped into a perfect cup of tea. Wrapping each individual sachet allows us to ensure each bag is fresh, full of flavor, and ready to be enjoyed. Take some on the road with you or enjoy our Art of Tea signature tea box designs, perfect for an artful contribution to your kitchen counters.

CREATE A PERFECT BREW - Each tea pack includes 50 individual tea sachets, enough for 50 strong cups of delicious tea! Each sachet is blended for one 8 oz cup of tea, for this Rose Black Tea Blend, steep water to 206 degrees Fahrenheit and steep for 3-5 minutes. If you’re looking to brew a bigger batch, add one tea bag per 8 ounces of water for a strong brew in larger doses.
CAFFEINE CONTENTS - This Rose Black Tea blend contains a moderate amount of caffeine, making this a perfect tea to start your day with. Goes great with breakfast.
ADDITIVE FREE - All of Art of Tea’s blends are 100% organic or made of natural ingredients with no additives. This Rose Black tea includes: Black Tea, Organic Rose Petals, Natural Flavor

bullets: Hong Kong-style milk tea is a popular tea drink made from Ceylon black tea and milk. It is usually part of Hongkongers' tea culture, typically served as part of afternoon tea but also at breakfast or dinner.

[Product Description] The product is 100% Ceylon Black Tea. It is the best tea to make traditional Hong Kong Style Milk Tea. Hong Kong-style milk tea is a unique drink in Hong Kong. The entrance is smooth and silky, and it will not rush down in one drink, but stretches fine and honey, with a creamy taste.
[Direction] 1.) Make tea like ordinary black tea, or boil tea in a kettle for a strong flavour. 2.) Filter out the tea particles. 3.) Add sugar and milk to the tea, then serve.

item_details.A Heavenly Duo: Thai Tea and Brown Sugar Milk Tea
item_details.I recently tried both the Thai Tea and B: The Thai tea is an authentic taste of Thailand in every sip. The tea has a strong, robust flavor that's perfectly balanced with creamy milk and just the right amount of sweetness. The subtle hints of spices like star anise and cardamom make it truly special. It's versatile too—delicious over ice or warm. The vibrant orange color is eye-catching and adds to the overall experience. If you love Thai tea, this one won’t disappoint! Brown Sugar Milk Tea: The Brown Sugar Milk Tea is equally delightful. The combination of rich, caramel-like brown sugar with smooth, creamy milk creates an indulgent, velvety texture. The sweetness is just right, making it a treat without being overwhelming. It’s like having a bubble tea shop experience right at home. Whether you’re enjoying it on its own or with your favorite snacks, this brown sugar milk tea is a satisfying choice. Overall, both the Thai Tea and Brown Sugar Milk Tea exceeded my expectations. bullets: ✓ Premium Japanese Ceremonial Grade Matcha, Fresh from Japan - Made from shade grown, First Harvest tea leaves from Uji Kyoto. The tencha is only ground into powder right before it leaves Japan for the USA, and then sealed into air-tight packets. This gets you extremely fresh, quality Uji matcha to be enjoyed right here in America.

✓ Smooth, Balanced And Versatile, Ideal For Matcha Beginners - This matcha ceremonial grade green tea powder is smooth with balanced umami with a just a tiny hint of bitterness. It is the perfect matcha for beginners looking to make matcha lattes, or matcha teas (usucha).We recommend using this for recipes where matcha is the main ingredient.

✓ Improve Your Focus, Boost Energy Without Coffee – Greatly increase your focus and energy by drinking Naoki Matcha. Unlike the typical caffeine rush from coffee, the amino acid L-theanine in Naoki Matcha moderates the effects of caffeine and helps to relax the mind and body while providing a steady boost of energy for up to 6 hours. Matcha is also naturally gluten and sugar free, and is a healthy source of antioxidants.

✓ We Want To Help You Enjoy Matcha – To ensure you have the best matcha experience, we provide our full guidance through directions for use, recipes and tips for enjoying it. Whether you like to drink matcha as a tea, or to mix it up as a latte or smoothie, we do not think there’s a right or wrong way to enjoy matcha. Our 1.4 oz / 40g tin serves a total of 20 servings. 1 tsp (2 grams) of matcha powder makes either a cup of matcha tea (usucha) or a small matcha latte.

✓ Authentic Japanese Matcha From Uji – Uji is home to Japanese matcha culture and many of the tea estates have accumulated centuries of know-how and techniques. This blend of matcha is produced in Uji using these very same best practices.
Product Benefits: Smooth taste, improved focus, energy boost, and natural health benefits

item_details.Taste: this isn't as bold or flavorful as regular green tea. It has more of a...vegetable flavor. I prefer Yamamotoyama's Jasmine, genmaichai, or normal green. Gyokuro is from the year's first harvest so has a different taste. I guess I could review olives too but that shouldn't mean I give them a 1-star rating just because the taste doesn't suit me. Others love them and would give them a 5-star. This tea is very high quality. Certainly the highest I've ever bought in bag form on the Internet. I felt rich drinking it too knowing it was about a dollar a bag. I initially got two boxes of 16 packs each. I can't say I'll buy them monthly, but I will definitely purchase them again.

HARNEY & SONS IS A PROUD MEMBER OF 1% FOR THE PLANET. Joining 1% for The Planet in 2006 meant we could directly donate one percent of our total sales to the environmental organizations of our choice. Harney & Sons was founded on a commitment to deliver customers the finest quality tea possible. This promise, made over 30 years ago, serves as the company's guiding principle. Today, Harney & Sons Tea remains family owned and managed, with three generations of Harney's preserving John's tradition of fine tea and traveling the world in search of the finest ingredients. It is not only the Harney mission to deliver quality tea products to their customers, but also to educate the world of tea history and taste. Whether through their dedicated customer service team, their published guides to tea drinking, or their two tea tasting shops, the Harney & Sons team works to pass on their passion of tea to a wide audience. item_details.Brown Rice Aroma: Brown rice itself has a faint cereal aroma. This aroma gradually wafts out during the brewing process, giving people a simple and natural feeling, as if you were in the middle of a field, allowing you to sense the breath of nature. For example, when you open the tea bag and bring it close to your nose, you can clearly detect this delicate cereal fragrance.
item_details.Ginger Aroma: The pungent aroma emitted by ginger shreds is very distinct. The aroma of ginger is somewhat stimulating and can instantly activate the olfactory senses, giving people a warm and refreshing feeling. It blends with the aroma of brown rice to form a unique compound aroma. For instance, on a cold day, smelling the ginger aroma can make you feel a slight warmth in your body.
item_details.Tangerine Peel Aroma: Tangerine peel has a unique citrus fruit aroma and aged fragrance. Its aroma is relatively gentle and long-lasting, adding a touch of richness and charm to the overall aroma of the tea. When the ginger aroma, brown rice aroma, and tangerine peel aroma are combined, the aroma becomes even more diverse and multi-layered.
item_details.Mellow Taste of Brown Rice: After brewing, brown rice releases some starches and nutrients, making the tea soup have a certain thickness and mellow taste. Drinking it gives a full and substantial feeling, just like savoring a bowl of thick rice soup, bringing a rich texture to the mouth.
item_details.Pungent Stimulation of Ginger: The pungent taste of ginger shreds is quite evident in the mouthfeel. This pungency is not an intense stinging sensation but a mild stimulation that causes a slight burning sensation in the mouth and throat, followed by a warm and comfortable feeling. The combination of this pungency and the mellow taste of brown rice makes the taste more abundant.
item_details.Sweet and Sour Aftertaste of Tangerine P: Tangerine peel itself has a certain sweet and sour taste, which can play a role in adjusting the mouthfeel of the tea soup. After taking a sip of the tea, a faint sweet and sour aftertaste lingers in the mouth. This aftertaste, intertwined with the pungency of ginger and the mellow taste of brown rice, makes the overall taste more rich and varied and also balances the flavor of the tea soup.

bullets: ⭐This tea is crafted according to traditional recipes, with a scientific ratio of ingredients including brown rice, orange peel, and ginger. The raw materials are of high quality, fresh, and carefully selected, ensuring visible quality. They come in independent packaging, making it convenient to brew anytime, saving you time and effort.
⭐The tea soup emits a pure herbal aroma. When you take a sip, it tastes mellow, with a subtle hint of sweetness that lingers on the palate, offering a unique and pleasant taste experience.

⭐The dry tea leaves showcase a clear texture and uniform size. They are dried while still fresh, and a special process is employed to retain the moisture of each herb. This ensures that the tea maintains its quality and flavor over time.Each type of herbal tea is processed into a dry form, preserving its characteristic aroma. When brewed, the tea leaves unfurl completely, maintaining their color. Moreover, they can be infused more than three times, allowing you to enjoy the rich flavor of the tea multiple times.

⭐Ginger rice tea has a unique taste. Its aroma is rich in layers, with the faint cereal fragrance of brown rice, the distinct pungent aroma of ginger, and the gentle and long-lasting citrus and aged fragrance of tangerine peel, all blending together. The taste is rich and varied. The brewed brown rice makes the tea soup mellow and thick, ginger brings a mild pungent stimulation, and tangerine peel has a sweet and sour aftertaste, all interweaving with each other. The overall taste is a warm, mellow, and multi-layered experience. When it enters the mouth, the mellow taste of brown rice and the pungency of ginger blend together.
